stimulus:
Welcome! In this study, you will play three short video games, completing a short survey after each game.

Please make sure you are in a quiet environment where you can focus for the duration of the study. Some games may use sound, so please ensure that your device's volume is not muted.

Press any key to begin.
Press any key to proceed to the first video game. Should you encounter a game-breaking bug, please report the issue in the Menu tab to the right of the screen.

response: {"creativity-rating":1,"creativity-free-response":"The concept is very generic you click on the screen to make the character go forward and avoid obstacles there are too many of these kinds of games already","originality-rating":1,"originality-free-response":"The entire game is something you can find on the app store right now and 1000 games like it. It is just different variations of games like flappy bird","effectiveness-rating":1,"effectiveness-free-response":"The game is way too basic for my taste all I had to do in order to win was to make the character go high up and move forward I barely even have to dodge any obstacles","authenticity-rating":1,"attention-check":3,"intentionality-rating":1,"authenticity-intentionality-free-response":"I think the game was just a blatant rip off of other games and there was barely no effort put it into it. I would not be shocked if AI made this game"}
